title: New october update - laggy/buggy
excerpt:

The “Download All” button from the comment section …

posts.author: Denny (Denis)
posts.cookedHtml:
I wanted to share some concerns regarding the recent Monday.com update. Unfortunately, the new changes have introduced several issues that are affecting our workflow:

  1. The “Download All” button from the comment section is missing, which was an essential feature for us.
  2. When uploading images in the comments, they often fail to fully upload, with only 1 out of 7 images registering properly.
  3. When leaving comments on images, they don’t show directly inside the commment/chat section of the item but you need to reload the page in full to see it.

DAL1059×593 97.5 KB

These problems are causing significant disruptions, and we’re finding the platform less user-friendly and stable than before. Please address these issues as soon as possible, or we may need to explore alternative solutions.

Thanks for your attention to this matter.

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Deny

Thanks for your feedback. I am going to pass this along to our product team and see if they can share any more insight around this. Your feedback is really important for development team as we continue to build a future roadmap. Have you reached out to support team around this issue? They will be able to have an in- depth look into your account.

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Denis! Thanks for your patience and for flagging these issues. We’re really sorry for any frustration caused! I’ve discussed it with our product and support teams, they’ve requested that you submit a ticket here so that we can take a proper look into your account details and resolve any bugs that might be impacting you.

posts.author: DanteInferno (Zakaria Makboul)
posts.cookedHtml: Not only that sometimes outof no where the board crashes with no reason

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Zakaria, we’d love to take an in-depth look at that issue for you - could you reach out to support here as well?
